channel.title: Pages on Tanishq Srivastava
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Tanishq Srivastava

item.title: About
item.description:
Hey, I’m Tannat 👋

I’m a Software Engineer with a focus on building scalable, reliable backend systems. I enjoy working across the stack — from designing APIs and data pipelines to fine-tuning infrastructure — but Go is where I feel most at home.

When I’m not coding, you’ll find me planning the next road trip, writing about tech, or deep-diving into distributed systems papers.

Skills

Backend — Go · Python · Node.js · REST APIs · gRPC

Infrastructure — Docker · Kubernetes · PostgreSQL · Redis · Kafka

Tools — Git · Linux · Terraform · CI/CD

Experience

Software Engineer — Current Company (2022 – Present)

Building high-throughput backend services in Go. Working on microservice architecture, observability, and developer tooling.

Software Engineer — Previous Company (2020 – 2022)

Full-stack development with a focus on API design and performance optimisation.

Education

B.Tech, Computer Science — Your University (2020)

Get in touch

  • GitHub: github.com/tannatsri
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/tannatsri
  • Email: tanishqsrivastava92@gmail.com

item.title: Projects
item.description:
A selection of projects I’ve worked on. Most are open source — feel free to dig into the code.

Portfolio Site

Stack: Hugo · Go · GitHub Pages

This very site. A fast, statically-generated personal portfolio built with the Hugo Stack theme. All personal details are driven from a single data/config.yaml so updates take seconds.

View Source →

Distributed Task Queue

Stack: Go · Redis · PostgreSQL

A lightweight distributed task queue with at-least-once delivery guarantees, worker pools, and a dead-letter queue for failed jobs. Built to handle high-throughput job scheduling with minimal operational overhead.

GitHub →

API Gateway Middleware

Stack: Go · gRPC · Docker

A composable middleware layer for Go HTTP/gRPC services — handles rate limiting, request tracing, JWT validation, and structured logging with near-zero overhead.

GitHub →

Travel Log CLI

Stack: Go · SQLite · Cobra

A command-line tool for tracking travel destinations, budgets, and itineraries. Exports data to Markdown for easy publishing to a static site.

GitHub →

More projects on GitHub →
